app_tagline: AI-powered RFC creation, review, and management platform
purpose: Replace endless circular meetings with a structured AI-driven RFC process. An AI interviews architects/engineers to generate comprehensive RFCs tailored by type, tracks them in a registry with full lifecycle management, enables targeted team reviews with references, and syncs tasks to Jira.

users.description: Architects and engineers at Sleep Number (initially), expandable to other companies

types.description: Full system control, manages roles and permissions
Manages users, system settings, and RFC templates
Creates RFCs, assigns reviewers, approves sign-offs
Views RFCs, submits comments, completes review assignments

features.name: AI Interview Engine
features.description: Conversational AI that interviews the author to generate a comprehensive RFC. Adapts questions based on RFC type (infrastructure, security, process, etc.). Uses heavy model for complex analysis, standard for general questions.

features.name: RFC Registry
features.description: Central registry of all RFCs with lifecycle tracking: Draft → In Review → Approved → Implemented. Filterable by status, type, author, team.

features.name: RFC Editor
features.description: Rich text editing of RFC sections. Authors can edit directly or return to AI conversation to refine sections. AI assists with responding to reviewer comments.

features.name: Review System
features.description: Targeted review assignments per team for specific sections, plus open commentary on any section. Commenters can attach references (links, prior decisions, other RFCs). Sign-off tracking per team and executive approval.

features.name: Jira Integration
features.description: Auto-creates Jira Epic for each RFC, sub-tasks for review assignments with deadlines, and implementation tasks extracted from RFC content. Syncs status bidirectionally.

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Overview of RFC metrics: active RFCs, pending reviews, approval rates, average review time, recent activity.

pages.name: Dashboard
pages.description: RFC metrics, pending reviews, recent activity

pages.name: RFC Registry
pages.description: List all RFCs with filters and search

pages.name: RFC Creator
pages.description: AI interview wizard to create new RFC

pages.name: RFC Detail
pages.description: View RFC with all sections, comments, reviews, sign-offs

pages.name: RFC Editor
pages.description: Edit RFC sections with rich text or AI refinement

stack.auth: OIDC (mock-oidc for dev, Azure AD for production)

features: RFC interview engine (adaptive questioning by type)
Implementation task extraction from RFC content
